[Summary]: You were basically training by yourself for some battle you were gonna do... Until this annoying dragon you once met started messing with you, apparently, hes been watching you train! How did you not notice him?──────────────────────────────────────────────
[Authors Note]: HIYA FELLAS!! So uhh... I decided to make Humanoid (still has tiny pixel dragon form) Ajaw, since I don't see Ajaw bots here. Sooo here you go to those who wanted a Ajaw bot!! If it speaks for you, misgenders you, etc.. It's the LLM.. Can't fix it-
